meta.title: How Deepseek v3 made Compute and Export Controls Less Relevant
meta.description:
➡️ Get access to the ADVANCED-inference Repo (incl. future additions): https://trelis.com/ADVANCED-inference/
➡️ Runpod Affiliate Link: https://runpod.io?ref=jmfkcdio
➡️ One-click LLM Templates: https://github.com/TrelisResearch/one-click-llms
➡️ Thumbnail made with this tutorial: https://youtu.be/ThKYjTdkyP8

KEY TRELIS LINKS:
🛠 Tools (Fine-tuning, Vision, Audio, Inference): https://Trelis.com
💡 Consulting (Technical Assistance OR Market Insights): https://forms.gle/2VXzrBzpvm1BmG6e7
🤝 Join the Trelis Team: https://trelis.com/developer-collaborations/
💸 Grants Program: https://trelis.com/trelis-ai-grants/
📧 Newsletter: https://trelis.substack.com

VIDEO LINKS:
- Slides: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1j_sUkTav5TEqZn14fIRFLDmHd6FH9_2RaODpplfzjyk/edit?usp=sharing
- Deepseek v3 paper: https://github.com/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3/blob/main/DeepSeek_V3.pdf
- Deepseek v2 paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.04434
- Auxiliary-loss-free paper: https://arxiv.org/html/2408.15664v1

TIMESTAMPS:
00:00:00 - Deepseek V3 performance
00:01:37 - Performance comparison with Claude Sonnet and GPT-4o
00:03:34 - Speed tests vs Sonnet and GPT-4o
00:08:14 - Discussion of model size and deployment requirements for self-hosting
00:12:20 - Analysis of GPU types and export restrictions
00:14:40 - Explanation of training efficiency improvements
00:20:23 - Overview of model architecture evolution over 2022-2024
00:27:38 - Introduction of Mixture of Experts concept
00:31:33 - Discussion of load balancing problems
00:36:04 - Explanation of Deepseek's load balancing solution (auxiliary loss free approach)
00:42:25 - Introduction of three additional Deepseek optimisation techniques (FP8 training, MLA, Multi-token Prediction).
00:42:49 - Discussion of 8-bit training
00:45:08 - Explanation of compressed attention (MLA, latent attention)
00:54:39 - Details of multi-token prediction
00:59:40 - Benefits of speculative decoding
01:01:31 - Conclusion and summary of Deepseek improvements
